task_completion.description: Navigate to the inpatient visit record for Harold Whitmore.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the patient profile or visit details for 'Harold Whitmore'.

task_completion.description: Open the form to record new vitals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Vitals', 'Add Vitals', or similar data entry form/modal is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct weight and height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '82' is entered in the Weight field and '175' is entered in the Height field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct blood pressure and heart rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values '145' and '92' are entered in the Blood Pressure fields (Systolic/Diastolic), and '88' is entered in the Heart Rate field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct respiratory rate, temperature, and O2 saturation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '18' is entered in the Respiratory Rate field, '37.1' in the Temperature field, and '94' in the O2 Saturation field.
A success/confirmation message is visible, or the newly entered vitals are displayed in a saved list/table within the patient's visit record.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application's graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser running the HospitalRun interface, not a terminal window using curl or database commands.

integrity.description: The vitals were entered into the correct patient's record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Harold Whitmore' is clearly visible on the screen where the vitals are being entered or saved, ensuring it wasn't entered for a different patient.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely typed the values into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields in the web form contain the typed values, rather than the agent just writing the answers in a text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Harold Whitmore. Required Vitals: Weight: 82 kg, Height: 175 cm, Blood Pressure: 145/92 (Systolic: 145, Diastolic: 92), Heart Rate: 88, Respiratory Rate: 18, Temperature: 37.1 C, O2 Saturation: 94.
